ranks.description: Vengeful Retreat Talent Requires Demon Hunter Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take (16% of Attack Power) Physical damage [ Vengeful Bonds : and have their movement speed reduced by 70% for 3 sec ].
Voidblade Talent Requires Demon Hunter Unleash your glaives and charge to your target, dealing (225% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage. Devourer Generates .

Sigil of Misery Talent Requires Demon Hunter Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec . Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec .
Vengeful Bonds Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by 70% for 3 sec.
Unrestrained Fury Talent Requires Demon Hunter Increases maximum Fury by 20.
Shattered Restoration Talent Requires Demon Hunter The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.
Improved Sigil of Misery Talent Requires Demon Hunter Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of [ Sigil of Chains : Chains / Misery] by [ Sigil of Chains : 30 / 30] sec.
Bouncing Glaives Talent Requires Demon Hunter Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.
Imprison Talent Requires Demon Hunter Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.
Charred Warblades Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeance ( Vengeance Demon Hunter ) You heal for 4% of all Fire damage you deal. You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.
Void Nova Talent Requires Demon Hunter Unleash an eruption of void energy, dealing (27.4816% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage and stunning your target and all nearby enemies for 2 sec.
Improved Disrupt Talent Requires Demon Hunter Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.
Consume Magic Talent Requires Demon Hunter Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target [ Swallowed Anger : and granting you ].
Aldrachi Design Talent Requires Demon Hunter Increases your chance to parry by 3%.

Focused Ire Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Vengeance The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec. Devourer The primary target of Void Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.
Master of the Glaive Talent Requires Demon Hunter Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.
Champion of the Glaive Talent Requires Demon Hunter Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.
Disrupting Fury Requires Demon Hunter Requires level 1 Disrupt generates on a successful interrupt.
Blazing Path Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Shift gains an additional charge. Havoc gains an additional charge. Vengeance Infernal Strike gains an additional charge.
Swallowed Anger Talent Requires Demon Hunter Consume Magic generates when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.
Aura of Pain Talent Requires Demon Hunter Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.
Live by the Glaive Talent Requires Demon Hunter When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and . This effect may only occur once every 5 sec. (5s cooldown)
Pursuit Talent Requires Demon Hunter Mastery increases your movement speed.
Soul Rending Talent Requires Demon Hunter Requires level 35 Leech increased by 6%. Gain an additional 6% leech while Metamorphosis is active.
Soul Rending Talent Requires Demon Hunter Requires level 35 Leech increased by 6%. Gain an additional 6% leech while Metamorphosis is active.

Felfire Haste Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Fel Rush increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec. Vengeance Infernal Strike increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec. Devourer Shift increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.
Infernal Armor Talent Requires Demon Hunter Requires level 30 Immolation Aura increases your armor by 20% and causes melee attackers to suffer [(12% of Attack Power)] Fire damage.
Infernal Armor Talent Requires Demon Hunter Requires level 30 Immolation Aura increases your armor by 20% and causes melee attackers to suffer [(12% of Attack Power)] Fire damage.
Burn It Out Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Vengeance Immolation Aura removes 1 Disease effect. Devourer Soul Immolation removes 1 Disease effect.
Soul Cleanse Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Vengeance Immolation Aura removes 1 Curse effect. Devourer Soul Immolation removes 1 Curse effect.
Lost in Darkness Talent Requires Demon Hunter Spectral Sight has 5 sec reduced cooldown and no longer reduces movement speed.
Illidari Knowledge Talent Requires Demon Hunter Reduces magic damage taken by 3%.
Illidari Knowledge Talent Requires Demon Hunter Reduces magic damage taken by 3%.
Guile Talent Requires Demon Hunter The cast range of Voidblade, Consume Magic, and Disrupt are increased by 20 yds.
Will of the Illidari Talent Requires Demon Hunter Increases maximum health by 3%.
Will of the Illidari Talent Requires Demon Hunter Increases maximum health by 3%.
Internal Struggle Talent Requires Demon Hunter Increases your mastery by (2 * $mas)%.
Furious Talent Requires Demon Hunter Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.
Remorseless Talent Requires Demon Hunter Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.

First In, Last Out Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Fel Rush grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health. Vengeance Infernal Strike grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health. Devourer Shift grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.

Erratic Felheart Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc The cooldown of Fel Rush is reduced by 1.0 sec. Vengeance The cooldown of Infernal Strike is reduced by 1.0 sec. Devourer The cooldown of Shift is reduced by 1.0 sec.

Erratic Felheart Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc The cooldown of Fel Rush is reduced by 1.0 sec. Vengeance The cooldown of Infernal Strike is reduced by 1.0 sec. Devourer The cooldown of Shift is reduced by 1.0 sec.

Final Breath Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Fully channeling Eye Beam increases the damage of its final tick by 300%. Vengeance Fully channeling Fel Devastation increases the damage of its final tick by 300%. Devourer Fully channeling Void Ray increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

Darkness Talent Requires Demon Hunter Summons darkness around you in a n 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec . Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.
Demon Muzzle Talent Requires Demon Hunter Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.
Soul Splitter Talent Requires Demon Hunter Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 2% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.
Soul Splitter Talent Requires Demon Hunter Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 2% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.
Wings of Wrath Talent Requires Demon Hunter Glide speed increased by 10%.
Long Night Talent Requires Demon Hunter Increases the duration of Darkness by 3 sec.
Pitch Black Talent Requires Demon Hunter Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.
Demonic Resilience Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Devourer Blur gains 1 additional charge. Vengeance Demon Spikes gains 1 additional charge.

effects.target_spell_name: Demonic Resilience Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Devourer Blur

ranks.description: Demonsurge Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Metamorphosis now also causes Demon Blades to generate 3 additional Fury. While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Demonsurge, causing you to explode with Fel energy, dealing (280% of Attack Power) Chaos damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. Devourer Void Metamorphosis now also greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash. While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing (625% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Void Ray Talent Channeled () Requires Demon Hunter Requires Unleash a beam of concentrated void energy, dealing (20.25% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage and consuming every 0.2 sec. Effect ends after 3 sec or upon reaching .

Wave of Debilitation Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Chaos Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades. Devourer Void Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades.
Pursuit of Angriness Talent Requires Demon Hunter Movement speed increased by 1% per .

Focused Hatred Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Demonsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target. Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%. Devourer Voidsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target. Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.
Set Fire to the Pain Talent Requires Demon Hunter 5% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over 6 sec. Fire damage taken reduced by 10%.

Improved Soul Rending Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Metamorphosis is active. Devourer Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Void Metamorphosis is active.
Blind Focus Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Cosmic damage increased by 3%. Effect is doubled while in demon form. Havoc Fire damage increased by 5%. Effect is doubled while in demon form.
Soul Immolation Talent Requires Demon Hunter Light your soul aflame, dealing (500% of Spell Power) Fire damage to yourself, generating and shattering 3 Soul Fragments over 5 sec. (500ms cooldown)
Predator's Thirst Talent Requires Demon Hunter Consume damage increased by 15%. Consume generates a Soul Fragment.

Burning Blades Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Your blades burn with Cosmic energy, causing your Voidblade, Reap, and Throw Glaive to deal an additional 35% damage as Cosmic damage. Havoc Your blades burn with Fel energy, causing the damage from Chaos Strike, Throw Glaive, Blade Dance's First Blood, and auto-attacks to burn for an additional 35% damage as Fire over 6 sec.

Violent Transformation Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Entering Void Metamorphosis resets the cooldown of Voidblade and The Hunt. Havoc When you activate Metamorphosis, reset the cooldown of Immolation Aura.

Enduring Torment Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Chaos Strike and Blade Dance damage by 15%, and Haste by 5%. Devourer The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.

Undying Embers Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Immolation Aura has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect. Devourer Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.
Tempered Soul Talent Requires Demon Hunter The cooldown of Soul Immolation is reduced by 30 sec and it gains 1 additional charge.

ranks.description: Spontaneous Immolation Talent Requires Demon Hunter Casting a damaging spell has a 5% chance to activate Soul Immolation for 5 sec. (100ms cooldown)

Void Metamorphosis Talent Requires Demon Hunter Collecting 50 Soul Fragments grants access to Void Metamorphosis. Void Metamorphosis Requires 50 Soul Fragments You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities. While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.
Feast of Souls Talent Requires Demon Hunter Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
Untethered Fury Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Maximum Fury increased by 20. Havoc Maximum Fury increased by 50.

Student of Suffering Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Eye Beam applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by (8 * $mas)% and granting every 2 sec, for 6 sec. Devourer Void Ray applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by (8 * $mas)% and granting every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

Flamebound Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Hungering Slash has 2 yd increased radius and 125% increased critical strike damage bonus. Havoc Immolation Aura has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.
Monster Rising Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Agility increased by 8% while not in demon form. Devourer Intellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.

Volatile Instinct Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay. Havoc Entering demon form immediately induces a Demonsurge. (100ms cooldown)
Scythe's Embrace Talent Requires Demon Hunter Reap now generates .
Duty Eternal Talent Requires Demon Hunter Voidblade damage increased by 100% and Voidblade now generates .

Collapsing Star Talent Requires Demon Hunter While in Void Metamorphosis, every 30 Soul Fragments harvested grants access to Collapsing Star. Collapsing Star Channel an immense amount of void energy into a single, cataclysmic blast, dealing (562.5% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to your target and [(562.5% of Spell Power) * 0.5] Cosmic damage to all nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets. While casting Collapsing Star, your Fury drain is significantly reduced.
Moment of Craving Talent Requires Demon Hunter After fully channeling Void Ray, the cooldown of Reap is reset and your next Reap will collect up to 6 additional Soul Fragments.

Demonic Intensity Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Activating Metamorphosis greatly empowers Eye Beam, Immolation Aura. Demonsurge damage is increased by 5% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active. Devourer Activating Void Metamorphosis greatly empowers The Hunt. Voidsurge damage is increased by 10% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.
Gift of the Void Talent Requires Demon Hunter Your critical strike chance is increased by 2%.
Entropy Talent Requires Demon Hunter While in combat, generate 1 Soul Fragment every 12 sec. While out of combat, you will slowly build towards your Void Metamorphosis, up to 25 Soul Fragments.
Waste Not Talent Requires Demon Hunter Damage from Void Ray has a 200% increased chance to generate a Soul Fragment.
Soulshaper Talent Requires Demon Hunter Each Soul Fragment gathered by Reap increases its damage by 8%.

Voidfall Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Devourer Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall. Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing (200% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets. Vengeance Fracture has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall. Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Soul Cleave consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing (540% of Attack Power) Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing (625% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.
Singed Spirit Talent Requires Demon Hunter Soul Immolation generates an additional over its duration.

Sweet Suffering Talent Requires Demon Hunter The duration of Feast of Souls is increased by 2 sec. Feast of Souls : Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

Sweet Release Talent Requires Demon Hunter Your chance to shatter a Soul Fragment from enemies you damage is increased by 2%.

Hungering Slash Talent Requires Demon Hunter After dealing damage with The Hunt or Voidblade, Voidblade is replaced with Hungering Slash for 6 sec. Hungering Slash Violently slash your scythe around you, dealing (247.5% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to nearby enemies and generating . Shatters up to 2 Soul Fragments from nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets. Hungering Slash grants a temporary charge of Vengeful Retreat and causes your next Vengeful Retreat within 6 sec to deal an additional (150% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage.

Devourer Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 10 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration. Havoc Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.

Singular Strikes Talent Requires Demon Hunter Voidblade damage increased by 25%. Hungering Slash deals 50% increased damage to its primary target.

Student of Suffering Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Eye Beam applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by (8 * $mas)% and granting every 2 sec, for 6 sec. Devourer Void Ray applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by (8 * $mas)% and granting every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

Flamebound Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Hungering Slash has 2 yd increased radius and 125% increased critical strike damage bonus. Havoc Immolation Aura has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.

Vengeance Your first Spirit Bomb after entering demon form causes a Shadowflame meteor shower to assault the area, dealing [(90% of Attack Power) * 12] Shadowflame damage over 6 sec.

Calamitous Talent Requires Demon Hunter Your damaging critical strikes deal 240% damage instead of the usual 200%.

Vengeance The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and reduces the remaining cooldown of Metamorphosis by 10 sec.

The Hunt Talent Requires Demon Hunter Charge to your target, striking them for (600% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting (382.5% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

Volatile Instinct Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay. Havoc Entering demon form immediately induces a Demonsurge. (100ms cooldown)
Blind Focus Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Cosmic damage increased by 3%. Effect is doubled while in demon form. Havoc Fire damage increased by 5%. Effect is doubled while in demon form.

Undying Embers Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Immolation Aura has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect. Devourer Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.
Incisive Blade Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Chaos Strike deals 10% increased damage. Vengeance Soul Cleave deals 10% increased damage.
Army Unto Oneself Talent Requires Demon Hunter Felblade surrounds you with a Blade Ward, reducing damage taken by 10% for 5 sec.

Incorruptible Spirit Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeance Each Soul Fragment you consume shields you for an additional 10% of the amount healed. Havoc Each Soul Fragment you consume shields you for an additional 15% of the amount healed.

Wounded Quarry Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeance Expose weaknesses in the target of your Reaver's Mark , causing your Physical damage to any enemy to also deal 20% of the damage dealt to your marked target as Chaos, and sometimes shatter a Soul Fragment. Havoc Expose weaknesses in the target of your Reaver's Mark , causing your Physical damage to any enemy to also deal 25% of the damage dealt to your marked target as Chaos, and sometimes shatter a Soul Fragment.

Fury of the Aldrachi Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Blade Dance casts 3 additional glaive slashes to nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. If cast after Chaos Strike, cast 6 slashes instead. Vengeance When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Soul Cleave casts 3 additional glaive slashes to nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. If cast after , cast 6 slashes instead.

Reaver's Mark Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeance When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, applies Reaver's Mark, which causes the target to take 7% increased damage for 20 sec. Max 2 stacks. Applies 1 additional stack of Reaver's Mark If cast after Soul Cleave. Havoc When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Chaos Strike applies Reaver's Mark, which causes the target to take 7% increased damage for 20 sec. Max 2 stacks. Applies 1 additional stack of Reaver's Mark If cast after Blade Dance.

Bladecraft Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Fury of the Aldrachi further empowers Blade Dance when cast after Chaos Strike, increasing slashes to 12. Reaver's Mark now stacks up to 2 times and further empowers Chaos Strike when cast after Blade Dance, applying an additional stack. Vengeance Fury of the Aldrachi further empowers Soul Cleave when cast after Fracture, increasing slashes to 12. Reaver's Mark now stacks up to 2 times and further empowers Fracture when cast after Soul Cleave, applying an additional stack.
Keen Engagement Talent Requires Demon Hunter Reaver's Glaive generates .
Preemptive Strike Talent Requires Demon Hunter Throw Glaive deals (20% of Attack Power) Physical damage to enemies near its initial target.
Evasive Action Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeful Retreat can be cast a second time within 3 sec. (3s cooldown)
Unhindered Assault Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeful Retreat resets the cooldown of Felblade.
Aldrachi Tactics Talent Requires Demon Hunter The second enhanced ability in a pattern shatters an additional Soul Fragment.

Art of the Glaive Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeance Consuming 20 Soul Fragments or casting Sigil of Spite converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive. Reaver's Glaive : Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing (335% of Attack Power) Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies. Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next and Soul Cleave. The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage. Havoc Consuming 6 Soul Fragments or casting The Hunt converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive. Reaver's Glaive : Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing (335% of Attack Power) Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies. Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next Chaos Strike and Blade Dance. The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage.

Thrill of the Fight Talent Requires Demon Hunter After consuming both enhancements, gain Thrill of the Fight, increasing the damage of your next Reaver's Glaive by 30% and increasing Haste by 8% for 30 sec.

Warblade's Hunger Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeance Consuming a Soul Fragment causes your next to deal (40% of Attack Power) additional Physical damage. Havoc Consuming a Soul Fragment causes your next Chaos Strike to deal (40% of Attack Power) additional Physical damage. Felblade consumes up to 5 nearby Soul Fragments.
Keen Edge Talent Requires Demon Hunter Reaver's Glaive damage is increased by 20% and other Physical-only damage is increased by 10%.

Broken Spirit Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeance Sigil of Spite shatters 1 additional Soul Fragment. Soul Cleave has a 20% chance to shatter a Soul Fragment. Havoc The Hunt shatters 1 Soul Fragment. Blade Dance and Chaos Strike have a 15% chance to shatter a Soul Fragment. (100ms cooldown)

World Killer Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Devourer The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and generates 1 Soul Fragment. Vengeance The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and reduces the remaining cooldown of Metamorphosis by 10 sec.

Otherworldly Focus Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Devourer Collapsing Star and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target. Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%. Vengeance Spirit Bomb and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target. Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.

Dark Matter Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Devourer Your first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing [(50% of Spell Power) * 12] Cosmic damage over 6 sec. Vengeance Your first Spirit Bomb after entering demon form causes a Shadowflame meteor shower to assault the area, dealing [(90% of Attack Power) * 12] Shadowflame damage over 6 sec.
Final Hour Talent Requires Demon Hunter Passive bonuses granted by each stack of Voidfall persist for 8 sec after being consumed.

Meteoric Fall Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Devourer While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes. Vengeance While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Spirit Bomb and Soul Cleave consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.

Mass Acceleration Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Devourer Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Reap upon activating Void Metamorphosis. Vengeance Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Spirit Bomb upon activating Metamorphosis.
Path to Oblivion Talent Requires Demon Hunter Each stack of Voidfall grants 3% increased movement speed.
State of Matter Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Devourer Shift has 1 additional charge. Vengeance Torment has 1 additional charge.

Voidfall Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Devourer Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall. Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing (200% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets. Vengeance Fracture has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall. Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Soul Cleave consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing (540% of Attack Power) Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Doomsayer Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeance Activating Infernal Strike out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 1 Voidfall Meteor. Devourer Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 10 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration. Havoc Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.
Harness the Cosmos Talent Requires Demon Hunter Voidfall Meteor damage increased by 15%.

Celestial Echoes Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeance Shear generates 5 additional Fury and deals 30% increased damage. Havoc, Devourer Consume generates 2 additional Fury and deals 15% increased damage.
Phase Shift Talent Requires Demon Hunter Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% reduced damage taken.
Catastrophe Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc, Vengeance, Devourer Enemies struck by a Voidfall Meteor take an additional 25% damage over 8 sec.
Swift Erasure Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Each stack of Voidfall grants 1% Haste. Havoc, Vengeance Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% Haste.

Meteoric Rise Talent Requires Demon Hunter Vengeance Fel Devastation damage increased by 25%. Fel Devastation generates 3 Soul Fragments over its duration. Havoc, Devourer Void Ray damage increased by 15%. Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.
Monster Rising Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Agility increased by 8% while not in demon form. Devourer Intellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.
Blind Focus Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Cosmic damage increased by 3%. Effect is doubled while in demon form. Havoc Fire damage increased by 5%. Effect is doubled while in demon form.

Enduring Torment Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Chaos Strike and Blade Dance damage by 15%, and Haste by 5%. Devourer The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.

Student of Suffering Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Eye Beam applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by (8 * $mas)% and granting every 2 sec, for 6 sec. Devourer Void Ray applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by (8 * $mas)% and granting every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

Flamebound Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Hungering Slash has 2 yd increased radius and 125% increased critical strike damage bonus. Havoc Immolation Aura has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.

Undying Embers Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Immolation Aura has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect. Devourer Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.
Untethered Fury Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Maximum Fury increased by 20. Havoc Maximum Fury increased by 50.

Volatile Instinct Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay. Havoc Entering demon form immediately induces a Demonsurge. (100ms cooldown)

Burning Blades Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Your blades burn with Cosmic energy, causing your Voidblade, Reap, and Throw Glaive to deal an additional 35% damage as Cosmic damage. Havoc Your blades burn with Fel energy, causing the damage from Chaos Strike, Throw Glaive, Blade Dance's First Blood, and auto-attacks to burn for an additional 35% damage as Fire over 6 sec.

Demonsurge Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Metamorphosis now also causes Demon Blades to generate 3 additional Fury. While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Demonsurge, causing you to explode with Fel energy, dealing (280% of Attack Power) Chaos damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. Devourer Void Metamorphosis now also greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash. While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing (625% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Focused Hatred Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Demonsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target. Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%. Devourer Voidsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target. Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.

Wave of Debilitation Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Chaos Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades. Devourer Void Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades.
Pursuit of Angriness Talent Requires Demon Hunter Movement speed increased by 1% per .

Violent Transformation Talent Requires Demon Hunter Devourer Entering Void Metamorphosis resets the cooldown of Voidblade and The Hunt. Havoc When you activate Metamorphosis, reset the cooldown of Immolation Aura.

Demonic Intensity Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Activating Metamorphosis greatly empowers Eye Beam, Immolation Aura. Demonsurge damage is increased by 5% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active. Devourer Activating Void Metamorphosis greatly empowers The Hunt. Voidsurge damage is increased by 10% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.
Set Fire to the Pain Talent Requires Demon Hunter 5% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over 6 sec. Fire damage taken reduced by 10%.

Improved Soul Rending Talent Requires Demon Hunter Havoc Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Metamorphosis is active. Devourer Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Void Metamorphosis is active.
